---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for SSHD APWorld
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem Statement
What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed?

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you envision this feature working.

## Alternative Solutions
Have you considered any alternative approaches?

## Use Cases
Who would benefit from this feature and how?

## Implementation Complexity
If you have technical knowledge, estimate the complexity:
- [ ] Simple (minor change)
- [ ] Moderate (requires some refactoring)
- [ ] Complex (major feature)
- [ ] Unknown

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or examples here.

## Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing issues for similar feature requests
- [ ] This feature aligns with the project's goals
- [ ] I would be willing to help implement this (optional)
